patterns.name: Cloudflare Worker Runtime
patterns.rationale: Cloudflare-native edge execution for APIs and middleware
patterns.anti_patterns: Avoid mixing non-edge runtime assumptions into worker handlers

patterns.name: Edge Compute
patterns.anti_patterns: Avoid express/fastify for new edge services

patterns.name: Edge Data
patterns.blessed_solution: Cloudflare D1 for transactional edge data
patterns.anti_patterns: Avoid direct pg/mysql clients in edge handlers

patterns.name: Edge Security
patterns.blessed_solution: Token-based auth with scoped service bindings
patterns.rationale: Limits blast radius across edge services
patterns.anti_patterns: Avoid shared hardcoded secrets across handlers
